text:
(a) The department shall issue Texas Medical Center specialty license plates. The department shall design the license plates in consultation with Texas Medical Center.

(b) After deduction of the department’s administrative costs, the remainder of the fee for issuance of the license plates shall be deposited to the credit of an account created by the comptroller in the manner provided by Section 504.6012 (Elimination of Dedicated Revenue Accounts; Revenues in Trust) (b). Money deposited to that account may be used only by the comptroller to provide grants to benefit Texas Medical Center and member institutions of Texas Medical Center.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 504.665 (Alamo License Plates) by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 324 (S.B. 1488 ), Sec. 24.001(56), eff. September 1, 2017.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 504. License Plates
##### § 504.667 — Texas Medical Center License Plates

(a) The department shall issue Texas Medical Center specialty license plates. The department shall design the license plates in consultation with Texas Medical Center.

(b) After deduction of the department’s administrative costs, the remainder of the fee for issuance of the license plates shall be deposited to the credit of an account created by the comptroller in the manner provided by Section 504.6012 (Elimination of Dedicated Revenue Accounts; Revenues in Trust) (b). Money deposited to that account may be used only by the comptroller to provide grants to benefit Texas Medical Center and member institutions of Texas Medical Center.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 504.665 (Alamo License Plates) by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 324 (S.B. 1488 ), Sec. 24.001(56), eff. September 1, 2017.

*Added by Acts 2015, 84th Leg., R.S., Ch. 41 (S.B.742), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2015.*

Money deposited to that account may be used only by the comptroller to provide grants to benefit Texas Medical Center and member institutions of Texas Medical Center.
